phonetic: 藞ba瑟蓹藢伞r忙f; 藞ba瑟蓹藢伞r蓱藧f
meaning: n.鍒濇湡涔嬬數褰辨斁鏄犳満鎴栧綍闊虫満
examples: In his 1985 album Biograph, Dylan wrote about the appeal of folk music to him.
Boswell was the biograph er of Dr Johnson.
It's been 75 years since federal agents gunned down John Dillinger outside the Biograph Theater in Chicago, but the bank robber continues to be a provocative figure in American history.
